testcase.name: test_evite_sus_one_day_create

failure.message: AssertionError: Signup mismatch for sheet index 0 (title=None): expected 2, got 12

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_sus_one_day_create.TestEviteSUSOneDayCreate object at 0x7f53b3f1ea20> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f53b389b920>
def test_evite_sus_one_day_create(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] sign_up_sheet_maker = config.pages["sign_up_sheet_maker"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info("Start %s", _test_name)
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time() if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
sign_up_sheet_maker.select_sus_event_from_meganav(sus_event="one_day")
sign_up_sheet_maker.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.create_sheet_one_day(test_data=self._json_test_data) > sign_up_sheet_maker.verify_sheet_sign_ups(test_data=self._json_test_data)
_test_name = 'test_evite_sus_one_day_create' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f53b389b920> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7f53b3899520> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_sus_one_day_create (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7f53b389b890> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7f53b389b230> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7f53b389aa20> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_sus_one_day_create.TestEviteSUSOneDayCreate object at 0x7f53b3f1ea20> sign_up_sheet_maker = <commons.pages.evite.sign_up_sheet_maker.SignUpSheetMaker object at 0x7f53b389b980> user_email_addr = 'evite-02262026-093746-41-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234'

self = <commons.pages.evite.sign_up_sheet_maker.SignUpSheetMaker object at 0x7f53b389b980> test_data = {'RSVP_NOTE': 'Guests', 'invitation': {'date_format_style': 'Formal (ceremonial)', 'event_details': {'add_end_time': F..., 'whats_needed': 'chips'}, {'description': 'food description', 'volunteers_needed': 10, 'whats_needed': 'food'}], ...}
def verify_sheet_sign_ups(self, test_data): self.logger.info("Start %s.%s", self.__class__.__name__, inspect.stack()[0][3])
sheets_element = self.find(self._builder_items) sheets = sheets_element.find_elements(By.XPATH, "div")
for index, sheet in enumerate(sheets): web_signups = int( sheet.find_element(By.CSS_SELECTOR, f'[data-qa-id="slot-item-quantity-{index}-value"]').get_attribute( "data-qa-value" ) ) > assert web_signups == test_data["sheets"][index]["volunteers_needed"], ( f"Signup mismatch for sheet index {index} " f"(title={test_data['sheets'][index].get('title')!r}): " f"expected {test_data['sheets'][index]['volunteers_needed']}, got {web_signups}" ) E AssertionError: Signup mismatch for sheet index 0 (title=None): expected 2, got 12
index = 0 self = <commons.pages.evite.sign_up_sheet_maker.SignUpSheetMaker object at 0x7f53b389b980> sheet = <selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="e00a245da9fa8e4aeb3cca350b081b79", element="f.8382B68AE8427FE34593D6641B660E62.d.CB0CAA86137B1B052453972F5B930D6B.e.542")> sheets = [<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="e00a245da9fa8e4aeb3cca350b081b79", element="f.8382B68AE842...245da9fa8e4aeb3cca350b081b79", element="f.8382B68AE8427FE34593D6641B660E62.d.CB0CAA86137B1B052453972F5B930D6B.e.965")>] sheets_element = <selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="e00a245da9fa8e4aeb3cca350b081b79", element="f.8382B68AE8427FE34593D6641B660E62.d.CB0CAA86137B1B052453972F5B930D6B.e.959")> test_data = {'RSVP_NOTE': 'Guests', 'invitation': {'date_format_style': 'Formal (ceremonial)', 'event_details': {'add_end_time': F..., 'whats_needed': 'chips'}, {'description': 'food description', 'volunteers_needed': 10, 'whats_needed': 'food'}], ...} web_signups = 12
